nasb.text: But the donkey saw me and turned aside from me these three times. If she had not turned aside from me, I would surely have killed you just now, and let her live.”

esv.text: The donkey saw me and turned aside before me these three times. If she had not turned aside from me, surely just now I would have killed you and let her live.”

cnv.text: 驢看見了我，就三次從我面前轉開；驢若是沒有從我面前轉開，我早已把你殺了，而留牠活著。”

ccb.text: 你的驴看见我，一连躲避了三次，驴若没有躲开，我早已杀了你，只放过驴。”
